title: Remarkably Optimized
description: 1.16.5-26.1.2 | A performance mod pack to save your computer from doubling as a starchy spud with a remarkably optimized collection of mods!
body:
## Introducing Remarkably Optimized!
Experience smooth gameplay, fast loading times, and a performance boost that'll leave your game feeling remarkable! This modpack not only enhances performance but also includes shader support, zoom, and connected textures!

## Why Remarkably Optimized?
The goal of Remarkably Optimized is to create a super easy way for people to increase their performance while providing just the most essential OptiFine features. It cuts back on some of the clutter in other OptiFine replacement packs that I believe most players will not use.

## Works Anywhere
Remarkably Optimized doesn't add any additional content to the game, allowing for compatibility with most any world or server.

## Installation
I have full installation guides on my [Remarkably Optimized](https://www.youtube.com/@RemarkablyOptimized) YouTube channel. [This tutorial](https://youtu.be/MfQYEztwsmI) shows you how to install it for the Minecraft Launcher. You can also refer to [Modrinth documentation](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) on .mrpacks.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qstG0E2MXr0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Support or Issues?
If you encounter any issues or need assistance, join my helpful community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/hYkp5vaWZG). Create a post in the support channel, and either a moderator or myself will try to help you.

## Other Notes
If you do want to use Remarkably Optimized as a base in your own mod pack, feel free to do so, just make sure to include credit (a link back to this page works).
